user.title: Add RS-485 bus
user.description: Connect Home Assistant to an RS-485 serial bus for Modbus modules.

error.invalid_serial_port: Serial port must not be empty.
error.invalid_baudrate: Baud rate must be a positive integer.
error.invalid_parity: Parity must be N, E, or O.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to open the serial port. Check the path, permissions, and that no other Modbus master is using this RS-485 bus.

abort.already_configured: This RS-485 bus is already configured.

user.title: Add Modbus module
user.description: Add one Modbus module on this RS-485 bus.

error.invalid_device_id: Modbus address must be an integer from 1 to 247.
error.duplicate_device_id: This bus already has a module with this address.
error.invalid_bus_config: The parent serial bus configuration is invalid. Remove and re-add the bus.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to communicate with the module at this address.
error.cannot_validate_device: The module returned an invalid model or firmware response.
error.unexpected_model: The module type at this address is not supported yet.

abort.already_configured: This module is already configured on this bus.
